body.title: PROC_FLAG_ANOMALY: Igor surfaces gaps to cc_channel
body.result: flag_top_gap() added to learner.py. PROC_FLAG_ANOMALY seeded (tool, 300s interval). Test: synthetic NARRATIVE_GAP(salience=0.82) → channel_messages row confirmed as author=igor with [Igor notices] prefix.
body.description: Threshold habit fires when NARRATIVE_GAP salience>0.7, sends cc_send with the question so Akien sees Igor noticing things.
